COMMON.PERMISSION_DENIED: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.

SETTING.NAME: setting
SETTING.DESC: Configure bot settings (AI model, API key, language)

SETTING.PANEL_DESC:
Configure your AI model, API key, and language settings.
Click the button below to start configuration (Ephemeral).
SETTING.MODEL_CHANGE_DESC: Select which AI model to use for coding.
SETTING.USAGE_STATS_DESC: View your API usage and message count.
SETTING.API_KEY_MGMT_DESC: Register or delete your OpenRouter API key.
SETTING.MODEL_SELECT_DESC: Choose a preset that fits your needs.
SETTING.API_KEY_PROMPT: Please enter your OpenRouter API key in the modal.
SETTING.API_KEY_SET_SUCCESS: ✅ API key has been registered successfully.
SETTING.API_KEY_DELETE_CONFIRM: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete your API key?

CODING.PANEL_DESC: Select an action from the menu below.
CODING.SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE:
❌ You already have an active session: `{session_id}`
Please end it with `/coding end` before starting a new one.
CODING.API_KEY_MISSING:
❌ OpenRouter API key not found!
Please register it via `/setting` first.
CODING.SESSION_START_DESC: I've created a private coding room for you!
CODING.WELCOME_DESC: I am your AI coding assistant. Tell me what you want to build!
CODING.WELCOME_TIPS:
• Chat about features or code you want to create/fix.
• Use `!download` to get your files.
• Use `/coding end` to close this session.
CODING.AI_EMPTY_RESPONSE: ⚠️ AI response was empty. Please try again.
CODING.END_CONFIRM_DESC:
Are you sure you want to end this session?
The channel will be deleted.

FILE.DOWNLOAD_DESC: Select the files you want to download as a ZIP.
FILE.CLOSE_CONFIRM: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to close this room?
